problem id: 368f20dd
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  00000100 -> 00100000
  11100110 -> 00111110
  11000101 -> 00100100
  00111101 -> 11101011
  00101110 -> 01110010
  10110111 -> 10110011
  11101111 -> 01110110
  00110111 -> 10111011
  11111010 -> 11011111

query: 01010000
predicted answer: 10000101
